case_title: GOLDBERG DAVIDQ VS CALDARELLI GUSTAVO M CAL CREW PAINTING

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDBERG DAVIDQ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDARELLI GUSTAVO M CAL CREW PAINTING $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,808.00, DEF TO RETURN SLIDES BY 9/2/92 OR TO PAY JUDGEMENT OF $1800. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
